name: Tabs
description: Tabbed content with keyboard nav and animated active indicator.

api.name: Tabs
api.description: Tabbed content with keyboard nav and animated active indicator.

parameters.name: AnimatedIndicator
parameters.description: When true, renders a sliding underline that animates between active triggers inside each TabsList. Default is false (no underline, original behaviour).

parameters.name: RenderMode
parameters.description: Controls when each TabsContent panel is rendered into the DOM and whether its state survives a tab switch: Active (default) — only the active panel is in the DOM; switching away unmounts it (form inputs, scroll position and any component state are lost). Lightest footprint. Lazy — a panel is rendered the first time its tab becomes active, then kept in the DOM (hidden) so its state is preserved on subsequent switches. Like DevExpress OnDemand. Eager — every panel is rendered immediately; inactive ones are hidden. State always preserved, but the heaviest initial render. Like DevExpress Always. A single TabsContent can opt into eager rendering regardless of this setting via ForceMount="true".

parameters.name: SwipeEnabled
parameters.description: When true, a horizontal pointer drag (>50 px horizontal, <30 px vertical) on any TabsContent panel switches to the next or previous tab. Default is false (opt-in).

parameters.name: SwipeWrap
parameters.description: When true, swiping past the last tab wraps around to the first (and vice-versa). Default is false (no wrap-around at boundaries).

enums.name: TabsRenderMode
enums.description: Render strategy for TabsContent panels. See RenderMode for the semantics of each value.

records.name: TabsContext
records.signature:
TabsContext(
        string ActiveValue,
        EventCallback<string> SetValue,
        TabsOrientation Orientation,
        TabsVariant Variant,
        Dictionary<string, (string TabId, string PanelId)> TabIds,
        bool AnimatedIndicator,
        TabsRenderMode RenderMode,
        HashSet<string> ActivatedValues,
        bool SwipeEnabled,
        bool SwipeWrap,
        Action<string> RegisterContent,
        Func<string, Task> SwipeNavigate)

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
<Tabs ActiveValue="account">
    <TabsList>
        <TabsTrigger Value="account">Account</TabsTrigger>
        <TabsTrigger Value="password">Password</TabsTrigger>
    </TabsList>
    <TabsContent Value="account">
        <Card>
            <CardHeader>
                <Heading Level="3" Size="lg" Class="leading-none tracking-tight">Account</Heading>
                <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">Make changes to your account here.</Lumeo.Text>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent>
                <Stack Gap="4">
                    <FormField Label="Name">
                        <Input Value="Pedro Duarte" />
                    </FormField>
                    <FormField Label="Username">
                        <Input Value="@peduarte" />
                    </FormField>
                </Stack>
            </CardContent>
            <CardFooter>
                <Button>Save changes</Button>
            </CardFooter>
        </Card>
    </TabsContent>
    <TabsContent Value="password">
        <Card>
            <CardHeader>
                <Heading Level="3" Size="lg" Class="leading-none tracking-tight">Password</Heading>
                <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">Change your password here.</Lumeo.Text>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent>
                <Stack Gap="4">
                    <FormField Label="Current password">
                        <Input type="password" />
                    </FormField>
                    <FormField Label="New password">
                        <Input type="password" />
                    </FormField>
                </Stack>
            </CardContent>
            <CardFooter>
                <Button>Save password</Button>
            </CardFooter>
        </Card>
    </TabsContent>
</Tabs>

examples.title: Notifications
examples.code: All Unread Archived @foreach (var n in _notifications) { @n.Title @n.Time } @foreach (var n in _notifications.Where(x => x.Unread)) { /* same */ } No archived notifications.

examples.title: Vertical Tabs
examples.code:
Account Security Notifications
AccountManage your account settings. Account settings content goes here. SecurityUpdate your security preferences. Security settings content goes here. NotificationsConfigure notification preferences. Notification settings content goes here.
@code { private string _verticalTab = "account"; }

examples.title: Simple
examples.code:
<Tabs ActiveValue="overview">
    <TabsList>
        <TabsTrigger Value="overview">Overview</TabsTrigger>
        <TabsTrigger Value="analytics">Analytics</TabsTrigger>
        <TabsTrigger Value="reports">Reports</TabsTrigger>
    </TabsList>
    <TabsContent Value="overview">
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted" Class="p-4">Overview content goes here.</Lumeo.Text>
    </TabsContent>
    <TabsContent Value="analytics">
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted" Class="p-4">Analytics content goes here.</Lumeo.Text>
    </TabsContent>
    <TabsContent Value="reports">
        <Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted" Class="p-4">Reports content goes here.</Lumeo.Text>
    </TabsContent>
</Tabs>

parameters.name: ForceMount
parameters.description: When true, this panel is always rendered into the DOM (hidden when inactive), regardless of the parent RenderMode. Use for panels whose state must survive every tab switch — e.g. a half-filled form — while leaving the rest of the tab set on the lighter default mode.

parameters.name: IconContent
parameters.description: Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

slots.name: IconContent
slots.description: Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.

mdSummary:
# Tabs

Tabbed content with keyboard nav and animated active indicator.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Navigation
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/tabs

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Tabs | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Tabs | ActiveValue | `string` | `""` |  |
| Tabs | ActiveValueChanged | `EventCallback<string>` | `` |  |
| Tabs | Orientation | `TabsOrientation` | `TabsOrientation.Horizontal` |  |
| Tabs | Variant | `TabsVariant` | `TabsVariant.Default` |  |
| Tabs | AnimatedIndicator | `bool` | `` | When true, renders a sliding underline that animates between active triggers inside each TabsList. Default is false (no underline, original behaviour). |
| Tabs | RenderMode | `TabsRenderMode` | `TabsRenderMode.Active` | Controls when each TabsContent panel is rendered into the DOM and whether its state survives a tab switch: Active (default) — only the active panel is in the DOM; switching away unmounts it (form inputs, scroll position and any component state are lost). Lightest footprint. Lazy — a panel is rendered the first time its tab becomes active, then kept in the DOM (hidden) so its state is preserved on subsequent switches. Like DevExpress OnDemand. Eager — every panel is rendered immediately; inactive ones are hidden. State always preserved, but the heaviest initial render. Like DevExpress Always. A single TabsContent can opt into eager rendering regardless of this setting via ForceMount="true". |
| Tabs | SwipeEnabled | `bool` | `` | When true, a horizontal pointer drag (>50 px horizontal, <30 px vertical) on any TabsContent panel switches to the next or previous tab. Default is false (opt-in). |
| Tabs | SwipeWrap | `bool` | `` | When true, swiping past the last tab wraps around to the first (and vice-versa). Default is false (no wrap-around at boundaries). |
| Tabs | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Tabs | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| TabsContent | Context | `Tabs.TabsContext` | `default!` |  |
| TabsContent | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| TabsContent | Value | `string` | `""` |  |
| TabsContent | ForceMount | `bool` | `` | When true, this panel is always rendered into the DOM (hidden when inactive), regardless of the parent RenderMode. Use for panels whose state must survive every tab switch — e.g. a half-filled form — while leaving the rest of the tab set on the lighter default mode. |
| TabsContent | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| TabsContent | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| TabsList | Context | `Tabs.TabsContext?` | `` |  |
| TabsList | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| TabsList | TrailingContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| TabsList | Scrollable | `bool` | `` |  |
| TabsList | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| TabsList | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| TabsTrigger | Context | `Tabs.TabsContext` | `default!` |  |
| TabsTrigger | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| TabsTrigger | IconContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component. |
| TabsTrigger | TrailingContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| TabsTrigger | Value | `string` | `""` |  |
| TabsTrigger | IsClosable | `bool` | `` |  |
| TabsTrigger | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |
| TabsTrigger | OnClose | `EventCallback` | `` |  |
| TabsTrigger | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| TabsTrigger | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Tabs) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (TabsContent) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (TabsList) — RenderFragment slot
- `TrailingContent` (TabsList) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (TabsTrigger) — RenderFragment slot
- `IconContent` (TabsTrigger) — Icon slot. Named IconContent to avoid shadowing the <Icon> component.
- `TrailingContent` (TabsTrigger) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `ActiveValueChanged` (`EventCallback<string>`)

## Sub-components
- `TabsContent`, `TabsList`, `TabsTrigger`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Context` (`Tabs.TabsContext`)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` (Lumeo.Services)
- `ComponentInteropService` (Lumeo.Services)
- `ComponentInteropService` ()
- `ThemeService` ()

## Keyboard
- `ArrowDown` — HandleKeyDown handles ArrowDown in TabsTrigger.razor
- `ArrowUp` — HandleKeyDown handles ArrowUp in TabsTrigger.razor
- `Home` — HandleKeyDown handles Home in TabsTrigger.razor
- `End` — HandleKeyDown handles End in TabsTrigger.razor

## Example
```razor
<Tabs />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-background`, `--color-border`, `--color-card`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-primary-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Tabs/Tabs.razor`
- `UI/Tabs/TabsContent.razor`
- `UI/Tabs/TabsList.razor`
- `UI/Tabs/TabsTrigger.razor`
